nasb.text: “I will go before you and make the rough places smooth; I will shatter the doors of bronze and cut through their iron bars.

esv.text: “I will go before you and level the exalted places, I will break in pieces the doors of bronze and cut through the bars of iron,

cnv.text: 我必親自領導你，把高低不平的路修平； 銅門，我必打破；鐵門，我必砍斷。

ccb.text: ‘我要走在你前面， 为你铲平高山， 打破铜门， 砍断铁闩。

csbs.text: “我必在你前面行， 修平崎岖之地； 我要打碎铜门， 砍断铁闩。
